title: FHSS 25-26 Academic Year Spring Semester Midterm Exam Schedule (Update: 03.04.2026)
content:
FHSS 25-26 Academic Year Spring Semester Midterm Exam Schedule (Update: 03.04.2026)

The 2025-2026 Spring Semester Midterm Exam Schedule is attached below.

You can get further information about the evaluation schedule for Homeworks/Presentations/Projects etc. from the lecturer of the course.

We wish you all the success in your exams.
